name: CommandRoot
description: Root controller for a command palette (cmdk pattern). Standalone filterable list, typically rendered inside Dialog.
whenToUse: Command palettes, searchable action lists, keyboard-driven navigation.
avoidWhen: Simple dropdown selection - use Select or Combobox.
accessibilityRequirements: Arrow keys navigate items. Enter selects. Built-in string matching filter.

onselect.description: Called when an item is selected.

parts.name: CommandDialog
parts.description: Dialog wrapper for a command palette, typically containing CommandRoot.
parts.whenToUse: Global command palette opened via keyboard shortcut (for example Cmd/Ctrl+K).
parts.accessibilityRequirements: Provide accessible labeling via aria-label or aria-labelledby.

aria-label.description: Accessible dialog label. Defaults to 'Command palette'.

aria-describedby.description: ID of element describing the dialog.

aria-labelledby.description: ID of element labeling the dialog.

parts.name: CommandInput
parts.description: Search input for filtering Command items.

parts.name: CommandList
parts.description: Scrollable list container for Command items.

parts.name: CommandItem
parts.description: Single selectable item in a Command list. Auto-filtered by search query.

value.description: Item value used for selection and filtering.

onselect.description: Called when this item is selected.

parts.name: CommandEmpty
parts.description: Content shown when no Command items match the search.

parts.name: CommandGroup
parts.description: Group of related Command items with optional heading.
parts.whenToUse: Inside CommandList to organize items into labeled sections.

parts.name: CommandShortcut
parts.description: Right-aligned keyboard shortcut hint within a command item.
parts.whenToUse: Inside CommandItem to display associated key bindings.

route.label: Command
route.description: Command palette with search and groups

examples.title: Command Palette
examples.code: New File Save Copy Home Settings Profile No results found
